evals.prompt: What did I write about the sprint planning meeting? Look through my noki notes and summarize it.
evals.expected_output: Runs `noki ls --json`, filters by title/label (e.g. with jq on .meta.title or .meta.labels), then `noki show <path> --json` on the match and summarizes content. Parses JSON, not the table.

evals.prompt: List all my notes tagged 'work' from my noki.
evals.expected_output: Runs `noki ls --json` and filters on .meta.labels containing 'work' (e.g. `jq '[.[] | select(.meta.labels | index("work"))]'`). Does not scrape the human table.
